Meta.title: Vlad Chikalkin — Full Stack Developer
Meta.description: Web developer with 8+ years of experience. React, Next.js, TypeScript. From Telegram apps to web platforms.

Hero.name: Vlad Chikalkin
Hero.tagline: Full Stack Developer · 8+ years · React / Next.js / TypeScript
Hero.description: I build web applications, websites, and services that are pleasant to use.

About.title: About me
About.summary: For 8+ years, I have been building websites and web apps that are easy to use. I have worked on large fintech projects, and now I also help people and teams bring their ideas online, from a portfolio website to a full service. I keep learning new technologies and enjoy finding simple solutions for complex tasks.

highlight.title: Large-scale fintech project
highlight.description: Created a leasing payments calculation system for a large company. In 3+ months I developed the web app, a mobile version, and integrations with corporate services, which helped speed up the product launch and sales.

Services.title: Got an idea? I can help build it
Services.lead: Need a website, personal page, Telegram bot, or a small app? I can help shape the idea, suggest the right approach, and build a finished product that is easy to use.

sites.title: Websites
sites.description: Portfolio sites, personal pages, and websites for projects or companies. A modern, fast website that looks great on phones and desktops.

webapps.title: Web applications
webapps.description: Services, user dashboards, and web apps built around your ideas and goals.

telegram.title: Telegram Mini Apps and bots
telegram.description: Building practical Telegram tools: bots and mini apps for everyday tasks.

custom.title: Help with your idea
custom.description: Only have an initial idea? I can turn it into a clear plan and a working solution.

HomeLab.title: Home Lab
HomeLab.description: I build and develop my own home infrastructure: services, automation, and a smart home. I constantly experiment with new technologies, learn modern tools, and bring them into my personal projects.

zapishis_online_bot.title: Zapishis.online
zapishis_online_bot.description: A Telegram mini app for tutors, masters, and clients. Booking, schedule management, and notifications.

next_downloader_bot.title: Next Downloader Bot
next_downloader_bot.description: Telegram bot for downloading videos from TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and more — in a single message.

eslint_config.title: ESLint Config Awesome
eslint_config.description: ESLint configuration with profiles for Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Used across all projects.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal site with modern design, i18n, dark theme, and Lighthouse 95+ optimization.

next_tailwind_eslint_boilerplate.title: Next Tailwind ESLint Boilerplate
next_tailwind_eslint_boilerplate.description: A Next.js boilerplate with Tailwind, ESLint, i18n, and a clean baseline architecture for new projects.

victoria_pianist_site.title: Victoria Chikalkina | Pianist
victoria_pianist_site.description: A personal website for a pianist with portfolio-style presentation and artist profile.

Contact.title: Let's discuss your project
Contact.description: Open to job offers, collaboration, and end-to-end website development.
